name: Kelly Clutch leather clutch bag
description:
Very Good Condition Zippy Leather Hermes Clutch Accessory Pouch Bag. The Hermes branded zipper functions perfectly as it should. The outside of the bag is in really good shape with no major rips, tears, or any cracking of the leather, some minor signs of use. The side strap handle is in good shape with no major damage. The inside of this item is in fantastic shape with no rips, tears, or holes in the lining though there are some signs of use, staining. Overall this is a very nice looking clutch bag from the Hermes Fashion House. Please make sure to see all of the photos for the condition of this item! Will ship out by the next business day! *Please note this item will include a Hermes Dustbag for your items storage and protection*
